ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Continued To Jul-31-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Off Calendar

Application For A Prove Up Hearing Date To Have Default Judgment Entered Against Defts
Off Calendar May-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Robert Cohen, Esq. apecial appearance for plaintiff Creditors Trade Assoc., Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness Gary Looney was sworn and direct examined.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant VHG Mexican Partners, LLC., a California Limited Liability Company, dba COA Mexican Restaurand, VHG Bistro Partners, LLC., a California Limited Liability Company, dba Laurus as follows:

Damages/Principal - $36,849.42
Prejudgment Interest - $13,463.97
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00
Costs - $580.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $51,893.39

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Continued To Jun-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 6/4/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT MATTHEW SILVERMAN'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Ross Jacinto, Esq. of Gilbert & Nguyen 310/662-4718 for deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
